registry.description: Deceit is the deliberate shaping of another person's perception of reality to serve one's own interests. The Hebrew and Greek vocabulary is rich and varied: lying, treachery, flattery, false appearance, the smooth word that hides hostile intent. Deceit is not merely mistaken communication but the active weaponisation of language and appearance. It is treated as a fundamental violation of human relationship because it treats the other person as a target rather than a fellow bearer of the image of God.
